issues.description: Minor text artifacts: 'ab initio' appears as a single word but is split across lines, and 'scientific psychology' has a space before the dash.
issues.suggestion: Check text rendering engine for hyphenation and spacing rules; ensure proper handling of compound terms.

issues.description: Minor spacing issue: 'the extended and to change of place therein' has inconsistent spacing around 'to'.
issues.suggestion: Review text justification and spacing logic to ensure consistent word separation.

issues.description: No TOC present on this page, but it is a section heading page, not a TOC page. This is expected.
issues.suggestion: No action needed; this page is correctly classified as a section heading.

issues.description: Minor text formatting issue: 'London, July 1928 C.F.A Volume 1 Contents Translator's Note I. Origin and Landscape: (A) The Cosmic and the Microcosm II. Origin and Landscape: (B) The Group of the Higher Cultures III. Origin and' is cut off at the bottom of the page.
issues.suggestion: Ensure full text content is rendered on the page; adjust page layout or font size to accommodate long lines.

issues.description: Text is split across lines in a way that disrupts readability: 'The giant oak, upon one of whose leaves the droplet hangs, is not.¹' is split across two lines with 'The' starting a new line.
issues.suggestion: Review paragraph breaking logic to prevent mid-sentence line breaks; ensure proper hyphenation or line wrapping.

issues.description: Paragraph breaks are inconsistent: the text 'The giant oak...' appears to be a continuation of the previous paragraph but starts a new one.
issues.suggestion: Ensure paragraph breaks are correctly identified and rendered; check for missing or misplaced paragraph markers.

issues.description: Minor text artifact: 'fortgewirkt' is a German word that appears in the text without translation or context, which may be intentional but could be misinterpreted.
issues.suggestion: Ensure non-English terms are properly handled; consider adding a glossary or footnote if necessary.

issues.description: Text is split across lines in a way that disrupts readability: 'the Caliph of Frankistan, but on his other side he is but the chief of a' is split across two lines with 'the' starting a new line.
issues.suggestion: Review paragraph breaking logic to prevent mid-sentence line breaks; ensure proper hyphenation or line wrapping.

issues.description: Paragraph breaks are inconsistent: the text 'In Charlemagne...' appears to be a continuation of the previous paragraph but starts a new one.
issues.suggestion: Ensure paragraph breaks are correctly identified and rendered; check for missing or misplaced paragraph markers.

issues.description: Text is split across lines in a way that disrupts readability: 'But “people” is a linkage of which one is conscious. In ordinary usage, one designates as one’s “people” — and with feeling — that community, out of the many to which one belongs, which' is split across multiple lines with 'But' starting a new line.
issues.suggestion: Review paragraph breaking logic to prevent mid-sentence line breaks; ensure proper hyphenation or line wrapping.

issues.description: Paragraph breaks are inconsistent: the text 'But is it the Hellenes...' appears to be a continuation of the previous paragraph but starts a new one.
issues.suggestion: Ensure paragraph breaks are correctly identified and rendered; check for missing or misplaced paragraph markers.

issues.description: Minor OCR artifact: 'aft er' appears as a split word in the text
issues.suggestion: Check OCR engine settings or reprocess with better preprocessing
